description: depth = (resolving explorer's tip height) - (height of the block including the transaction) + 1, counted in blocks; a transaction in the tip block has depth exactly 1. A depth below the verifier's threshold is reported INSUFFICIENT_CONFIRMATIONS with verdict pending (never failed), and the pipeline SHOULD halt there. Both heights are explorer-asserted.

vectors.name: tip-block-depth-1
vectors.note: A transaction in the explorer's tip block has depth exactly 1.

vectors.name: exactly-at-threshold
vectors.note: depth == threshold satisfies the threshold; only depth < threshold is pending.

vectors.name: threshold-1-tip-block
vectors.note: Under a depth-1 threshold the tip block itself satisfies the check; the recommended deployment threshold is >= 15.
